---
title: '2014/06/11 Journal Wed'
date: '2014-06-11T10:58:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8824325015100045091'
blogger_filename: '/2014/06/20140611-journal-wed.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>Connor is off at camp, probably really enjoying himself.</p>
<p>Preston has been going to day camp. Yesterday he had a water&nbsp; balloon toss race, but lost.</p>
<p>Going to try a different recipe for the blender today.</p>
<p><u>DW</u></p>
